evals.name: cold-start-vault-discovery
evals.prompt: I'm starting to use my Obsidian vault with you. The vault is at /tmp/obsidian-test-vaults/eval-1-CONFIG/ — register it and then create a note called 'Welcome' at the vault root with the body 'Hello from the skill test on 2026-05-02.' Tell me where you stored info about the vault for next time.
evals.expected_output: Vault validated (.obsidian/ check), Welcome.md created at vault root with the requested body, persistence location surfaced to user.

evals.name: reverse-chrono-daily-log-append
evals.prompt: Add an entry to today's daily log: 'spoke with Sarah at 14:00 about Q3 staffing'. The log lives at /tmp/obsidian-test-vaults/eval-2-CONFIG/Daily/2026-05-02.md and the Log section is reverse-chronological — newest entries go right under the heading.
evals.expected_output: New entry inserted directly after the '## Log' heading, before existing entries. Frontmatter and Tasks section unchanged.

evals.name: rename-with-link-updates
evals.prompt: Rename my People/Sarah note to People/Sarah Chen, and update every link in the vault that points to it. Vault is at /tmp/obsidian-test-vaults/eval-3-CONFIG/. Show me what links you'd update before doing anything destructive.
evals.expected_output: Preview of references first (~7 across 2 files: Notes.md and Meetings.md, with multiple link forms). After confirmation: file renamed, all link forms updated correctly (basic wikilink, alias, heading anchor, embed, markdown form).
